rule CDB_Starkiller_Phishing_Service_Proxies_Real {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for ‘Starkiller’ Phishing Service Proxies Real Login Pages, MFA"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-09"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-FIN-12" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
